name: aoe2-buildguides-overlay
description: Windows companion overlay for Age of Empires II build orders.
author: AOE2 Build Overlay

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/detector.js && node --check src/main/build-engine.js && node --check src/main/settings-store.js && node --check src/renderer/dashboard.js && node --check src/renderer/overlay.js && node -e "require('./src/data/build-orders.json'); require('./src/data/hera-build-orders.json'); require('./src/data/civilizations.json'); require('./examples/custom-build-orders.example.json')"
